- ISSUE1 (Clarity & Precision): Prompt: “Based on these passages, the authors disagree about the ______ of the grooves.” Ambiguity: Both passages also conflict on time period (“millions of years ago” vs “the 1500s”), so a student could reasonably answer “age” or “time period,” which grammatically fits and is supported by the texts, yet would be marked incorrect because acceptable answers are limited to ["origin", "cause", "source"]. This creates multiple plausible interpretations of what the blank targets (cause/origin vs age/time), changing how a student answers.

overall.suggested_improvements:
- Clarify the prompt to target cause/origin explicitly, e.g., “Based on these passages, the authors disagree most about how the grooves were created (their cause or origin).”
